rulings.Case Title: ROBERT O'CONNOR VS. CARRINGTON MORTGAGE SERVICES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 17, 2018, line 1. DEFENDANT CARRINGTON MORTGAGE SERVICES, LLC, CARRINGTON FORECLOSURE SERVICES, LLC, CHRISTIANA TRUST, Defendants' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings OFF CALENDAR. Motion filed prior to answer in violation of CCP 438(f)(2). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 101 SANCHEZ ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. VAN TROI PANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 17, 2018, line 2. DEFENDANT VAN PANG MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to attach amended proof of service reflecting new execution date after additions have been made to the original document. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALICE TOY VS. HAO KING INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 17, 2018, line 4. DEFENDANT HAO KING INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint alleges two causes of action. Cause of action based on Notice to Pay Rent or Quit is sufficiently alleged and is not uncertain. Remaining arguments address only the second cause of action, and therefore the Complaint survives a general demurrer. = (501/REQ)
